series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes all temporary tag (tags)request forms that are submitted by dealerships for ordering tag/sticker inventories and includes receipt number(s) and number of tags/stickers ordered.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for a fiscal year and fiscal report is completed and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for a fiscal year and fiscal report is completed and all discrepancies are resolved, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
